ShortDescription.Value: Investigates and fixes the No Office Demand bug through office-resource and phantom-vacancy patches.

Publish.LongDescription:
No Office Demand Fix targets two known causes behind stalled office demand in Cities: Skylines II.
- Phantom Vacancy fix: removes stale PropertyOnMarket and PropertyToBeOnMarket state from occupied Signature office and industrial properties, preventing false free-space counts from suppressing demand. - Software track: includes an optional office-resource trade patch and diagnostics for the separate software supply problem that can still collapse office efficiency.
Current release status:
- fixes the confirmed Signature Phantom Vacancy case - keeps non-signature Phantom Vacancy cases under diagnostics - keeps the software path available as an experimental mitigation, not a claimed full fix
Publish.ChangeLog: Added diagnostics for non-signature phantom vacancy cases, and an optional office-resource patch to mitigate the software supply issue that can also cause office efficiency to collapse.
